JS|Dear Hiring Team, I am writing to express my interest in the AI Principan Engineer position at your company. With a strong background in full-stack development, scalable system architecture, and AI-integrated pipelines, I believe I can contribute effectively to building reliable and high-impact products for your team. I have hands-on experience designing and delivering production-grade systems, ranging from enterprise dashboards and automation tools to AI-powered data processing pipelines. My work focuses on solving real operational problems through asynchronous architectures, background processing, and end-to-end system ownership, from initial design to deployment and scaling. Previously, I have led and contributed to projects involving high-throughput workflows, document automation, and AI-driven data extraction, where performance, reliability, and business impact were critical. I am comfortable working across the full stack and collaborating closely with product and business stakeholders to translate complex requirements into scalable technical solutions. For reference, I have included my web-based portfolio at https://yoelpw.netlify.app, which showcases several recent projects demonstrating my experience in modern web development, system architecture, and applied AI solutions. I would welcome the opportunity to further discuss how my skills and experience align with your team’s needs. Thank you for your time and consideration. Kind regards,
Yoel Andreas Manoppo|Write a cover letter
